subject: New Assignment: Software Engineer – TypeScript – Fintech
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

SwiftLedger (fintech) is looking for a mid Software Engineer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:
• Start: ASAP
• Duration: 6 months
• Location: Stockholm (remote)
• Rate: up to 825 SEK/h

Required tech:
• TypeScript
• GCP
• Docker Compose
• PostgreSQL

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Oscar Lindgren
Senior Consultant Manager
Staffbridge Nordic
Tel: +46 73 233 45 67
